creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=e1901f9399a8130c5736524739a7d9bc60bd2dd6

commit e1901f9399a8130c5736524739a7d9bc60bd2dd6
Author:     nomoo <nomoo@nomoo.ru>
AuthorDate: 2024-08-06 09:40:04 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-08-07 15:25:05 +0000

    net-p2p/prowlarr: Update to 1.21.2.4649

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/Prowlarr/Prowlarr/releases/tag/v1.21.2.4649

     * Multiple Translations updated by Weblate
     * Remove PropTypes
     * Convert Add Indexer Modal to Typescript
     * Sort indexer queries stats by a sum of all 3 types
     * Improve messaging on no results with applied filter
     * Multiple Translations updated by Weblate
     * Fixed: Improve elapsed time collecting for grabs
     * Bump some frontend libraries
     * Fixed: (Nebulance) Searching for daily episodes using ids

    PR:             280634
    Reported by:    nomoo@nomoo.ru
    Approved by:    michiel@vanbaak.eu (maintainer)

 net-p2p/prowlarr/distinfo  |  6 +++---

 3 files changed, 13 insertions(+), 13 deletions(-)
